vi-√lip P. Ā. -limpati, ˚te, to smear or spread over, anoint (also ‘to anoint one's self’ P.),  ŚBr.  &c. &c.;
to smear or spread with (instr.),  Kum.  :
Caus. -lepayati, to smear or anoint with (instr.),  Hcat. ;
-limpayati See -limpita.

results.rendered_html:
vilip 6 P.
1 To smear, anoint. rub on; tathāhi nṛtyābhinayakriyācyutaṃ vilipyate maulibhiraṃbaraukasāṃ  Ku. 5. 79 ;  Bk. 3. 20 ; 15. 6 ;  Śi. 16. 62. 
2 To pollute, defile, taint, contaminate.
